description: Closed, maintainer-owned human-interrupt boundary. Only these edges may summon the human. Any other human-summoning / fail-closed-to-human / non-promotable route in the scanned tree is drift and must fail the seal canary.

boundaries.B1: Goal ratification: human ratifies ruler + budget envelope, once per goal.
boundaries.B2: Irreversible external effect beyond the ratified envelope: publish/release, delete published/user data, spend money/quota beyond budget, final product acceptance.
boundaries.B3: Constitution change: this enum, protected-core loop semantics, the two authorities, or the boundary_seal guard itself.
